_comment: Edit this file to control your council. 'enabled' turns a model on/off. 'command' is exactly what gets run, with {{PROMPT}} swapped for your question. 'synthesizerId' is which model merges the answers. If a model's command is wrong you'll see its error in the 'Council details' panel — just fix it here and refresh.
panelInstruction: You are one member of an advisory panel answering a user's question. Give your single best, direct answer. Be accurate, specific, and reasonably concise. Do not ask follow-up questions, do not use any tools, and do not read or modify any files — just answer the question in plain markdown.
